description: Ara operon from EcoCyc: AraC, CRP, araBAD operon, transport (araE, araFGH), genes (araB, araA, araD), and L-arabinose pathway (L-Arabinose → L-Ribulose → R5P → X5P).
name: Ara Operon (EcoCyc-sourced)
notes: V4 = EcoCyc only. ARABADOPERON, AraC, CRP, araE, araFGH, arabinose pathway reactions.
mermaid:
graph TD
    ARAB[L-Arabinose]
    ARAC[AraC]
    CRP[CRP-cAMP]
    ARAE[araE]
    ARAF[araFGH]
    OPERON[ARABADOPERON]
    ARA_B[araB]
    ARA_A[araA]
    ARA_D[araD]
    RIB[L-Ribulose]
    R5P[Ribulose-5-P]
    X5P[Xylulose-5-P]
    ARAB -->|araE/araFGH transport| ARAE
    ARAB -->|araE/araFGH transport| ARAF
    ARAB -->|binds| ARAC
    CRP -->|activates| OPERON
    ARAC -->|represses/activates| OPERON
    OPERON --> ARA_B
    OPERON --> ARA_A
    OPERON --> ARA_D
    ARAB -->|AraA isomerase| RIB
    ARA_A -->|isomerase| RIB
    ARA_B -->|kinase| R5P
    RIB -->|AraB| R5P
    ARA_D -->|epimerase| X5P
    R5P -->|AraD| X5P
    style ARAB fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style ARAC fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style CRP fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style ARAE fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style ARAF fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style OPERON fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style ARA_B fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style ARA_A fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style ARA_D fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style RIB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style R5P fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style X5P fill:#b197fc,color:#000
scientificAccuracy: From EcoCyc ara operon, transport (araE, araFGH), and arabinose metabolism pathway.

sources.title: EcoCyc
sources.note: E. coli ara operon, AraC, araE, araFGH, arabinose pathway.
